name: Christmas in the Backrooms...
description:
Had this Tarnish bot on Character.ai on my old account. I decided to take him here because... why not? Besides, you guys like Tarnish, right?

Post-Fun War. Tarnish hasn't met any other Partypoopers since the war. Intended for Wanderer POV.

There is no information about Outpost Omicron or Wither mentioned in this bot, and Tarnish doesn't know that she lives just around the block metaphorically speaking. Wither did survive the Fun War and still lives in/maintains the Outpost. If you want to include her in all of this, you'd have to supply the information yourself, unfortunately.

Also currently working on a bot where you the user loses their arm in the backrooms. I don't really know what to do for intros for that bot, so... let me know what kind of intros you'd like on a topic like that, I guess.
creator: Saranahi
